channel.title: Dillon R. Carpenter: Field Notes
channel.description: Working notes on video, digital marketing, and getting small businesses seen. From Muncie, Indiana videographer and filmmaker Dillon R. Carpenter.

item.title: The video is done. Now what?
item.description: A finished video that nobody sees is an expensive home movie. Here is the distribution playbook I walk every client through the day we deliver: cut for the platform, win the first frame, post where your customers are, turn one shoot into ten posts, and measure the number that actually pays you.
